creator: dohzono@axion-software.com
text:
Building py-subversion stops with error like below:

/usr/local/include/python2.6/Python.h:168:17: error: pth.h: No such file or directory

# make
===>  Found saved configuration for subversion-1.6.3
===>  Extracting for py26-subversion-1.6.6_1
=> MD5 Checksum OK for subversion/subversion-1.6.6.tar.bz2.
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for subversion/subversion-1.6.6.tar.bz2.
===>  Patching for py26-subversion-1.6.6_1
===>  Applying extra patch
/usr/ports/devel/py-subversion/../../devel/subversion/files/bindings-patch-subversion--bindings--swig--perl--native--Makefile.PL.in
===>  Applying FreeBSD patches for py26-subversion-1.6.6_1
===>   py26-subversion-1.6.6_1 depends on file: /usr/local/bin/python2.6 - found
===>   py26-subversion-1.6.6_1 depends on file: /usr/local/sbin/apxs - found
===>   py26-subversion-1.6.6_1 depends on package: libtool>=2.2 - found
===>   py26-subversion-1.6.6_1 depends on shared library: sqlite3.8 - found
===>   py26-subversion-1.6.6_1 depends on shared library: svn_client-1 - found
===>   py26-subversion-1.6.6_1 depends on shared library: intl - found
===>   py26-subversion-1.6.6_1 depends on shared library: db-4.2.2 - found
===>  Configuring for py26-subversion-1.6.6_1
(snip)
===>  Building for py26-subversion-1.6.6_1
cd /usr/local/tmp//usr/ports/devel/py-subversion/work/subversion-1.6.6 ; make
swig-py-lib ; make swig-py
/usr/local/bin/libtool --tag=CC --silent --mode=compile cc -fPIC -O2
-fno-strict-aliasing -pipe -D_REENTRANT -D_THREAD_SAFE  -DSWIGPYTHON
-I/usr/local/tmp/usr/ports/devel/py-subversion/work/subversion-1.6.6/subversion 
-I/usr/local/tmp/usr/ports/devel/py-subversion/work/subversion-1.6.6/subversion/include

-I/usr/local/tmp/usr/ports/devel/py-subversion/work/subversion-1.6.6/subversion/bindings/swig

-I/usr/local/tmp/usr/ports/devel/py-subversion/work/subversion-1.6.6/subversion/bindings/swig/include

-I/usr/local/tmp/usr/ports/devel/py-subversion/work/subversion-1.6.6/subversion/bindings/swig/proxy

-I/usr/local/tmp/usr/ports/devel/py-subversion/work/subversion-1.6.6/subversion/bindings/swig/proxy
 -I/usr/local/include/apache2 -I/usr/local/include/apache2 -I/usr/local/include
-I/usr/local/include/python2.6
-I/usr/local/tmp/usr/ports/devel/py-subversion/work/subversion-1.6.6/subversion/bindings/swig/python/libsvn_swig_py
-I./subversion/include -I./subversion  -I/usr/local/include/apache2  
-I/usr/local/include/apache2 -I/usr/local/include     -I/usr/local/include -o
subversion/bindings/swig/python/libsvn_swig_py/swigutil_py.lo -c
subversion/bindings/swig/python/libsvn_swig_py/swigutil_py.c
In file included from subversion/bindings/swig/python/libsvn_swig_py/swigutil_py.c:22:
/usr/local/include/python2.6/Python.h:168:17: error: pth.h: No such file or directory
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/local/tmp/usr/ports/devel/py-subversion/work/subversion-1.6.6.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/devel/py-subversion.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/devel/py-subversion.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /tmp/pkg_maint.
platinum#

How-To-Repeat: 1) configure python-2.6 as below:

> # This file is auto-generated by 'make config'.
> # No user-servicable parts inside!
> # Options for python26-2.6.2_2
> _OPTIONS_READ=python26-2.6.2_2
> WITH_THREADS=true
> WITHOUT_HUGE_STACK_SIZE=true
> WITHOUT_SEM=true
> WITH_PTH=true
> WITH_UCS4=true
> WITH_PYMALLOC=true
> WITH_IPV6=true
> WITHOUT_FPECTL=true

2) build devel/py-subversion
